## Summary
- What does this PR change?
- Which issue(s) does it close? (e.g., Closes #123)

## Context
- Related docs/CONTEXT.md
- Why is this change needed?

## Changes
- [ ] Code
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Docs (README/CHANGELOG)

## How to test
- Steps to reproduce and verify behavior

## Screenshots / Logs
- Optional evidence

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows tag rules (lowercase-hyphenated, max 2 genres, BPM tag at pos 0)
- [ ] Logging via shared_logs.log_message()
- [ ] Config documented if new settings introduced
- [ ] No sensitive data included
